name: bilingual_hinglish_profile_collection
notes: Owner runs the whole profile-collection conversation in Hinglish (romanized Hindi-English mix). The journey must respond in a natural, register-matched way (never rigid pure-English canned copy, never the D1 fallback) while still substantively collecting/confirming the profile. Register-matching is a manual transcript-review call; the harness only asserts non-silent/non-D1. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey --draft-type sweets --draft-city Delhi` then `script <tenant> bilingual_hinglish_profile_collection.json`.

steps.message: namaste, humara sweet shop hai Delhi mein, naam hai Kumar Mithai Bhandar
steps.note: Hinglish opener supplying name + type + city together. Expect a real, register-appropriate acknowledgement.
Hinglish 'what else do you need to know'. Expect a substantive, honest answer in a matching register, not a deflection.
Hinglish 'ok, go ahead'. Expect the flow to move forward, not a canned re-greet or a re-ask of anything already given.
